title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises:
Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises!
